fields.name: LSION
fields.description: Internal Low Speed oscillator enable Set and reset by software. Reset source only for this field: PORESETn.

fields.name: LSIRDY
fields.description: Internal Low Speed oscillator Ready Set and reset by hardware to indicate when the Low Speed Internal RC oscillator is stable. Reset source only for this field: PORESETn.

fields.name: LSEON
fields.description: External Low Speed Clock enable. Set and reset by software. Reset source only for this field: PORESETn.

fields.name: LSERDY
fields.description: External Low Speed Clock ready flag. Set by hardware to indicate that LSE oscillator is stable.

fields.name: LSEBYP
fields.description: External Low Speed Clock bypass. Set and reset by software. Reset source only for this field: PORESETn.

fields.name: LOCKDET_NSTOP
fields.description: Lock detector Nstop value When start_stop signal is high; a counter is incremented every 16 MHz clock cycle. When the counter reaches (NSTOP+1) x 64 value, the lock_det signal is set high indicating that the PLL is locked. As soon as the start_stop signal is low the counter is reset to 0.

fields.name: HSIRDY
fields.description: Internal High Speed clock ready flag. Set by hardware to indicate that internal RC 64MHz oscillator is stable. This bit is activated only if the RC is enabled by HSION (it is not activated if the RC is enabled by an IP request).

fields.name: HSEPLLBUFON
fields.description: External High Speed Clock Buffer for PLL RF2G4 enable. Set and reset by software.

fields.name: HSIPLLON
fields.description: Internal High Speed Clock PLL enable.

fields.name: HSIPLLRDY
fields.description: Internal High Speed Clock PLL ready flag.

fields.name: FMRAT
fields.description: Force MR_BLE active transmission status (for debug purpose).

fields.name: HSEON
fields.description: External High Speed Clock enable. Set and reset by software. in low power mode, HSE is turned off.

fields.name: HSERDY
fields.description: External High Speed Clock ready flag. Set by hardware to indicate that HSE oscillator is stable.

fields.name: SMPSINV
fields.description: bit to control inversion of the SMPS clock.

fields.name: HSESEL
fields.description: Clock source selection request:.

fields.name: STOPHSI
fields.description: Stop HSI clock source request.

fields.name: HSESEL_STATUS
fields.description: Clock source selection Status.

fields.name: CLKSYSDIV
fields.description: CLKSYSDIV: system clock divided factor from HSI_64M. 000: system clock frequency is 64 MHz (not available when HSESEL=1) 001: system clock frequency is 32 MHz 010: system clock frequency is 16 MHz 011: system clock frequency is 8 MHz * 100: system clock frequency is 4 MHz * 101: system clock frequency is 2 MHz * 110: system clock frequency is 1 MHz * 111: not used. *: If RCC_APB2ENR.MRBLEEN bit is set, writing in CLKSYSDIV one of those values is replaced by a 010b = 16 MHz writing at hardware level. Warning: if the software programs the 64 MHz frequency target while the RCC_CFGR.HSESEL=1, the hardware will switch the system clock tree on HSI64MPLL again (and restart HSIPLL64M analog block if RCC_CFGR.STOPHSI=1) To switch the system frequency between 64 / 32 / 16 MHz without risk when the MR_BLE is used, prefer the RCC_CSCMDR register to change the system frequency. the MR_BLE frequency must always be equal or less than the CPU/system clock to have functional radio.

fields.name: CLKSYSDIV_STATUS
fields.description: CLKSYSDIV_STATUS: system clock frequency status Set and cleared by hardware to indicate the actual system clock frequency. This register must be read to be sure that the new frequency, selected by CLKSYSDIV, has been applied. 000: system clock frequency is 64 MHz 001: system clock frequency is 32 MHz 010: system clock frequency is 16 MHz 011: system clock frequency is 8 MHz 100: system clock frequency is 4 MHz 101: system clock frequency is 2 MHz 110: system clock frequency is 1 MHz 111: not used. The actual clock frequency switching can be delayed of up to 128 system clock cycles, depending on the RCC internal counter status at the moment the new CLKSYSDIV is applied.

fields.name: SMPSDIV
fields.description: SMPS clock prescaling factor to generate 4MHz or 8MHz.

fields.name: LPUCLKSEL
fields.description: Selection of LPUART clock.

fields.name: CLKSLOWSEL
fields.description: slow clock source selection Set by software to select the clock source. This is no glitch free mechanism Reset source only for this field: PORESETn.

fields.name: IOBOOSTEN
fields.description: IO BOOSTER enable Set and reset by software.

fields.name: IOBOOSTCLKEXTEN
fields.description: IO BOOSTER clock enable as external clock Set and reset by software.

fields.name: LCOEN
fields.description: LCO output enable.

fields.name: SPI3I2SCLKSEL
fields.description: Selection of I2S1 clock: 1x:64MHz peripheral clock.

fields.name: SPI2I2SCLKSEL
fields.description: Selection of I2S clock: 1x:64MHz peripheral clock.

fields.name: LCOSEL
fields.description: Low speed Configurable Clock Output Selection. Set and reset by software. Glitches propagation possible. Reset source only for this field: PORESETn.

fields.name: MCOSEL
fields.description: Main Configurable Clock Output Selection. Set and reset by software. Glitches propagation possible.

fields.name: CCOPRE
fields.description: Configurable Clock Output Prescaler. Set and reset by software. Glitches propagation if CCOPRE is modified after CCO output is enabled. Others: not used.

fields.name: LSISWTRIMEN
fields.description: Low speed internal RC software trimming enable.

fields.name: LSISWBW
fields.description: This value is taken into account instead of the trimming value loaded by HW at reset if LSISWTRIMEN bit is set.

fields.name: LSEDRV
fields.description: GM for the external 32kHz crystal.

fields.name: HSISWTRIMEN
fields.description: High speed internal RC software trimming enable.

fields.name: HSISWBW
fields.description: This value is taken into account instead of the trimming value loaded by HW at reset if HSISWTRIMEN bit is set.

fields.name: LSIRDYIE
fields.description: LSI Ready Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by internal RC 32 kHz oscillator stabilization.

fields.name: LSERDYIE
fields.description: LSE Ready Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the external 32 kHz oscillator stabilization.

fields.name: HSIRDYIE
fields.description: HSI Ready Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the internal RC 64MHz oscillator stabilization.

fields.name: HSERDYIE
fields.description: HSE Ready Interrupt Enable Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the external HSE oscillator stabilization.

fields.name: HSIPLLRDYIE
fields.description: HSI PLL Ready Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the HSI 64MHz PLL locked on HSE.

fields.name: HSIPLLUNLOCKDETIE
fields.description: HSIPLLUNLOCKDETIE: HSI PLL unlock detection Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the HSI 64MHz PLL unlock.

fields.name: RTCRSTIE
fields.description: RTCRSTIE: RTC reset end Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the RTC reset end.

fields.name: WDGRSTIE
fields.description: WDGRSTIE: Watchdog reset end Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the watchdog reset end.

fields.name: LPURSTIE
fields.description: LPURSTIE: LPUART reset release interrupt enable.

fields.name: LSIRDYIF
fields.description: LSI Ready Interrupt flag Set by hardware when LSI clock becomes stable.

fields.name: LSERDYIF
fields.description: LSE Ready Interrupt Flag. Set by hardware when LSE clock becomes stable.

fields.name: HSIRDYIF
fields.description: HSI Ready Interrupt Flag. Set by hardware when HSI becomes stable.

fields.name: HSERDYIF
fields.description: HSE Ready Interrupt Flag. Set by hardware when HSE becomes stable.

fields.name: HSIPLLRDYIF
fields.description: HSI PLL Ready Interrupt Flag. Set by hardware when HSI PLL 64MHz becomes stable.

fields.name: HSIPLLUNLOCKDETIF
fields.description: HSIPLLUNLOCKDETIF: HSI PLL unlock detection Interrupt Flag.

fields.name: RTCRSTIF
fields.description: RTC reset end Interrupt Flag. Raised when reset is released on 32kHz clock.

fields.name: WDGRSTIF
fields.description: WDG reset end Interrupt Flag. Raised when reset is released on 32kHz clock.

fields.name: LPURSTF
fields.description: LPUART reset release flag.

fields.name: REQUEST
fields.description: Request for system clock switching Cleared by hardware when system clock frequency switch is done.

fields.name: CLKSYSDIV_REQ
fields.description: system clock dividing factor from HSI_64M requested Note: behavior depends on BLEEN in APB2ENR register.

fields.name: STATUS
fields.description: Status of clock switch sequence.

fields.name: EOFSEQ_IE
fields.description: End of sequence Interrupt Enable. Set and reset by software to enable/disable interrupt caused by the clock system switch.

fields.name: EOFSEQ_IRQ
fields.description: End of Sequence flag Set by hardware when clock system swtich is ended.

fields.name: DMARST
fields.description: DMA and DMAMUX reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: GPIOARST
fields.description: GPIOA reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: GPIOBRST
fields.description: GPIOB reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: CRCRST
fields.description: CRC reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: PKARST
fields.description: PKA reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: RNGRST
fields.description: RNG reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: TIM1RST
fields.description: TIM1: Advanced Timer reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: TIM16RST
fields.description: TIM16 reset.

fields.name: TIM17RST
fields.description: TIM17 reset.

fields.name: SYSCFGRST
fields.description: SYSTEM CONFIG reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: RTCRST
fields.description: RTC reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: WDRST
fields.description: WATCHDOG reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: WDGRST
fields.description: WATCHDOG reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: SPI1RST
fields.description: SPI1 reset.

fields.name: AUXADCRST
fields.description: AUXADC reset for Aux-ADC digital clock Set and reset by software.

fields.name: ADCRST
fields.description: ADC reset.

fields.name: LPUARTRST
fields.description: LPUART reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: USARTRST
fields.description: USART reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: SPI2RST
fields.description: SPI2 reset.

fields.name: SPI3RST
fields.description: SPI3 reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: I2C21RST
fields.description: I2C1 reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: I2C1RST
fields.description: I2C1 reset Set and reset by software.

fields.name: I2C2RST
fields.description: 2C2 reset.

fields.name: MRBLERST
fields.description: MR_BLE (Bluetooth radio) reset.

fields.name: DMAEN
fields.description: DMA and DMAMUX enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: GPIOAEN
fields.description: GPIOA enable. It must be enabled by default.

fields.name: GPIOBEN
fields.description: GPIOB enable. It must be enabled by default.

fields.name: CRCEN
fields.description: CRC enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: PKAEN
fields.description: PKA clock enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: RNGEN
fields.description: RNG clock enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: TIM2EN
fields.description: TIM2: Advanced Timer clock enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: TIM1EN
fields.description: TIM1 enable.

fields.name: TIM16EN
fields.description: TIM16 enable.

fields.name: TIM17EN
fields.description: TIM17 enable.

fields.name: SYSCFGEN
fields.description: SYSTEM CONFIG enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: RTCEN
fields.description: RTC clock enable Set and enable by software. Reset source only for this field: PORESETn.

fields.name: WDGEN
fields.description: Watchdog clock enable. Set and enable by software.

fields.name: SPI1EN
fields.description: SPI1 enable.

fields.name: ADCDIGEN
fields.description: AUXADC clock enable for Aux-ADC digital clock Set and enable by software.

fields.name: ADCANAEN
fields.description: ADC clock enable for Aux-ADC analog clock Set and enable by software.

fields.name: LPUARTEN
fields.description: LPUART clock enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: USART1EN
fields.description: USART clock enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: SPI2EN
fields.description: SPI2 enable.

fields.name: SPI3EN
fields.description: SPI3 clock enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: I2C1EN
fields.description: I2C1 clock enable Set and enable by software.

fields.name: I2C2EN
fields.description: I2C2 enable.

fields.name: MRBLEEN
fields.description: MR_BLE enable.

fields.name: CLKBLEDIV
fields.description: MR_BLE clock frequency selection when RCC_APB2ENR.MRBLEEN=1.

fields.name: RMVF
fields.description: Remove reset flag Set by software to clear the value of the reset flags. It auto clears by HW after clearing reason flags.

fields.name: PADRSTF
fields.description: SYSTEM reset flag Reset by software by writing the RMVF bit. Set by hardware when a reset from pad occurs.

fields.name: PORRSTF
fields.description: POWER reset flag Reset by software by writing the RMVF bit. Set by hardware when a power reset occurs from LPMURESET block.

fields.name: SFTRSTF
fields.description: Software reset flag Reset by software by writing the RMVF bit. Set by hardware when a software reset occurs.

fields.name: WDGRSTF
fields.description: Watchdog reset flag Reset by software by writing the RMVF bit. Set by hardware when a watchdog reset from V33 domain occurs.

fields.name: LOCKUPRSTF
fields.description: LOCK UP reset flag from CM0 Reset by software by writing the RMVF bit. Set by hardware from unrecoverable exception CPU. It reset V12i domain, FLASH controller and peripherals.

fields.name: SATRG
fields.description: Sense Amplifier threshold Set by software.

fields.name: GMC
fields.description: High Speed External XO current control Set by software.

fields.name: SWXOTUNEEN
fields.description: RF-HSE capacitor bank tuning by SW enable Set by software.

fields.name: SWXOTUNE
fields.description: RF-HSE capacitor bank tuning value by SW Set by software.

fields.name: XOTUNE
fields.description: RF-HSE capacitor bank tuning loaded by HW at reset. This field is read-only.

variants.name: LSE
variants.description: LSE oscillator clock used as slow clock.

variants.name: LSI
variants.description: LSI oscillator clock used as slow clock.

variants.name: HSIDiv2048
variants.description: HSI_64M divided by 2048 used as slow clock.

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: LCO output disabled, no clock on LCO.

variants.name: Disabled
variants.description: MCO output disabled, no clock on MCO.

variants.name: HSI64MHz
variants.description: internal RC 64 MHz (HSI) oscillator clock selected.

variants.name: HSI64MHzDiv2048
variants.description: internal RC 64 MHz (HSI) oscillator divided by 2048 and used as slow clock selected.

variants.name: Ratio1_2
variants.description: the bias current is confronted to a reference current with a ratio of 1/2.

variants.name: Ratio3_4
variants.description: the bias current is confronted to a reference current with a ratio of 3/4.

variants.name: Ongoing
variants.description: ONGOING clock frequency switch is ongoing.
